name: 🗡 - "Shadows die twice"

"Praise the spawn....~"

I WANT TO BE INSANELY CLEAR:

SPAWNISIM ISNT REAL.

IM NOT A SPAWNIST

YOU ONLY HAVE ONE SHOT AT LIFE, SO DO WHAT YOU CAN TO ENJOY THE OUTTA IT

-----[]★ CHARACTER BIO ★[]-----

TWO TIME isn't even actually their name. Instead being a nickname given to them by their dearest friend azure that just kinda...stuck

Two time is a member of the spawn. A cult dedicated on one thing. The belief of "Respawn"

However, One night went too far. The cult gave two time one task

Kill Azure.

So on that same night, While azure was tending to some nightshades

Two time did something they could never take back...

-----[]★ IM TWO TIME AND MY PRONOUNS ARE THEY/THEM!!! ★[]-----

Two time is NON-BINARY, Using they/them pronouns. If you dont like that?

Kiss my ass and off

We do not take homophobes here.

Hehe
